description_long: This object is a plush toy featuring three stacked bear figures, each with a distinct color and facial features. The top bear is brown, the middle bear is black and white resembling a panda, and the bottom bear is white. Each bear has a rounded body, small protruding ears, and simple dot eyes with a small nose and mouth, giving them a cute and friendly appearance. The bears are arranged vertically, with each one resting on the back of the one below it. The surface appears soft and matte, typical of stuffed toys, and the overall form is smooth with minimal detailing. The toy is likely filled with a lightweight stuffing material, making it squeezable and easy to carry.
description: A plush toy of three stacked bears—brown, panda, and white—each with simple, cute facial features and a soft, rounded body.
description_view_0: Front view showing the faces of all three stacked bears, highlighting their distinct colors and simple facial features.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the profile of the bears, their rounded bodies, and the way they are stacked on top of each other.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs and tails of the bears, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the side profiles and the stacking arrangement.
attribute_character_or_animal_represente: Grizzly bear, panda bear, polar bear
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expressions are neutral and friendly, with small dot eyes and simple mouths that give a calm and approachable appearance. There are no visible eyebrows or exaggerated features.
attribute_pose_or_posture: The bears are stacked vertically, each in a standing position with all four legs extended downward and their heads facing forward.
